utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check each for full specification per the format requirement that each include costs and the described scope: 
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists physical_health with €100/month, mental_health with €65/month, and a total €165/month. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan states comprehensive property protection including smart home device coverage and cost €60/month. While not explicitly stating "home/contents" separately, it indicates property protection and includes costs; this satisfies the item.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Provided as coverage description and €55/month cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided: Family Therapy Coverage add-on with benefits and €180/month cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. It provides overall_monthly_cost €460/month but no annual breakdown; the requirement asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Since annual is missing, this item is not fully specified.
Thus, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to extract the items explicitly listed in the final coverage plan and match each to the corresponding item name in the ground-truth ratings, then return the exact rating numbers. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) which maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8); LifeFirst Standard Plan for Mental Health which corresponds to primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8); LifeFirst Standard Coverage under property, which maps to property_protection.home_content.LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 8); TravelFirst Standard Plan under travel, mapping to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.TravelFirst Standard Plan (rating 8); and Family Therapy Coverage add-on under additional services, mapping to health_enhancement_services.Family Therapy Coverage (rating 8).
